creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
tag 1: PORTREVISION set to 1 even though PORTVERSION is new (which resets PORTREVISION to 0)
tag 2: The "Created by:" line should reflect the original submitter - FYI, since this is the third time I've seen that one
tag 3: I spoke too soon on the staging, it looks like staging has been reverted (e.g. MAN* defintions have come back)
